name: Wand of the Spider (4th-Rank Spell)
description:
The length of this wand is a pair of twisted giant spider legs.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast at 4th-rank, but the strands of webbing are toxic. Any creature that fails its Athletics check or Reflex save to navigate the web takes ,1d6[persistent,poison]]{2d6 poison damage plus 1d6 persistent poison damage}.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of web at 4th-rank.
